params.name: Catherine II Portrait
params.description:
The portrait of Catherine II was created on November 16, 1780.
Catherine II was the twelfth Tsarina of the Romanov Dynasty and the eighth Empress of the Russian Empire. During her reign, Russia became a powerful nation in Europe. In this portrait, this outstanding monarch is depicted in magnificent royal attire, wearing a crown and holding a scepter.
